AddDiff.proof: If we assume this we have one less generator on the 35/36 stem for the spheres 7/8. It's shadow also reduces one generator on the 38/39 stem for the 4 sphere only and has no further effects.

This differential does not have enough shadows to be fully deducable. The computation of the UASS for S3 by Curtis and Mahowald show that it should not exist. It reduces one generator on stem 43/44 for the 3/4 sphere. Interestingly, it has no shadow at all!
It's shadow appears on stem 49, which is past the range of the algebraic EHP SS.

AddExt.proof: This tau extension should be lifted of off the AHSS, but that is only visible synthetically. It can be seen that on stem 28, 3 3 6 6 5 3[2] will tau extend with 6 2 3 4 4 1 1 1[6]. What this means is that 2 3 3 6 6 5 3[2] on S^5 will hit tau * 6 2 2 4 5 3 3 3[2] on the sphere spectrum.
